command: for f in packages/app/src/i18n/*.ts; do echo "=== $f ==="; grep -c '":' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0; grep -c 'import' "$f" 2>/dev/null; head -5 "$f"; echo "---"; done
reason: Count keys and check imports in all app locale files
